$comment: Chrono Star Wars deck. In-universe events on the BBY/ABY axis (year 0 = Battle of Yavin). 'year' is the signed numeric sort key (BBY negative, ABY non-negative); 'yearLabel' is shown on reveal and timeline. 'description' is the guess clue and never states the BBY/ABY value. Typographic cards: no images.

cards.title: The Great Hyperspace Disaster
cards.description: A catastrophic hyperspace accident scatters deadly wreckage across a system at the height of the High Republic, and the Jedi race to save it.

cards.title: Invasion of Naboo
cards.description: The Trade Federation blockades and occupies a peaceful world, drawing a young slave boy from Tatooine into the fate of the galaxy.

cards.title: The Clone Wars Begin
cards.description: Clone troopers and Jedi storm a desert world to face the Separatist droid army, igniting a galaxy-wide war.

cards.title: Order 66 and the Empire's Rise
cards.description: The Supreme Chancellor turns the clone army on the Jedi, who are betrayed and all but destroyed as the Republic becomes an Empire.

cards.title: Liberation of Lothal
cards.description: Rebel cells drive the Empire off a backwater world in one of the rebellion's first true victories.

cards.title: Battle of Yavin
cards.description: A farm boy turned pilot destroys the Empire's planet-killing battle station with a single proton-torpedo shot.

cards.title: Battle of Hoth
cards.description: Imperial walkers assault a hidden Rebel base dug into the ice of a frozen world.

cards.title: Battle of Endor
cards.description: The Rebels destroy a second, unfinished battle station above a forest moon, and the Emperor is thrown down.

cards.title: A Mandalorian and the Child
cards.description: A lone bounty hunter in beskar armor takes in a mysterious Force-sensitive child as the young New Republic struggles to hold order.

cards.title: Battle of Exegol
cards.description: The Resistance and a hidden fleet of resurrected Sith warships clash above a dark, uncharted world in a final reckoning.
